name: MiniMax Coding Plan (minimaxi.com)

dataUsage.details: The public privacy policy located during research covers app/web privacy and third-party disclosures, but no primary-source statement was found on API/Coding Plan training use, opt-out, or retention for customer prompts/responses.

euAiAct.details: A public MiniMax statement was found about implementing AI-generated content labeling under Chinese rules, but no primary-source statement was found about EU AI Act compliance for the Coding Plan/API service.

notes: MiniMax publicly identifies the operating entity in the located privacy policy as Nanonoble Pte. Ltd., Singapore. However, no primary-source DPA, sub-processor list, SCC statement, API-data training policy, retention schedule, or EU data-residency commitment was found for the Coding Plan/API offering, so those fields are left null or marked unavailable.
